title: GPUlive's Winter Channel Trailer
text: Welcome in, welcome in. Klitschko, welcome back in. Oh my gosh, and I'm literally freezing here I hope you are coaxing up at home, right? I'm literally suffering here as you can see This is how suffering looks like in Slovakia Right, I wish I can go there one day. So beautiful Ho ho, welcome in indeed indeed. Well, sometimes when you are in Europe, feel free to wander
